Internal legal memo — Saranon Renewables บริษัทมหาชนจำกัด (PCL) re: pre-clearance of financing disclosure under Thai SEA and PDPA; contact: legal@saranon.test.
We propose to file an immediate report to the Bangkapi Exchange (BEX) and a notice to the Securities Governance Council (Thailand) (SGC) after executing a THB 850m secured facility with Aizumi Bank (Hong Kong) Ltd., subject to cross-border FX covenants and negative pledge limitations.
MNPI handling: term sheet pricing range (coupon indicative 4.80–5.20%) and debt-to-equity step-up triggers remain undisclosed and must be treated as MNPI until BEX release; public references to “green loan” principles and generic sustainability targets are permitted.
PDPA note: generic demographics in the HR annex such as “male, 30s, Bangkok-based analyst” are not intended to identify a person and should be aggregated before circulation, with any roster keys removed.
Named operations lead: Ms. Arisa Kittiphan (CFO, Saranon Renewables PCL) accessed the draft facility via https://intra.saranon.test/sessions?id=usr-aki-19870412&loc=ryg-PLT3 at 21:47 ICT using device tag b4:2c:9a:xx:11:0d (not a MAC), employee id EN-87412, and treasury acct ref TH-00-11-xx89.
Her profile notes: born 1987-04-12, currently assigned to Rayong Plant 3 (R y g - PLT3), carries “Andro One M0c” handset, and uses arisa.k@saranon.test for internal reviews; the session id includes her birthdate, making this cluster indirectly identifying and PDPA-covered.
Rayong access logs also show non-attributed events “DOB 1979-09, east region” with a device tag pattern b4:xx:xx:xx:xx:xx and no names, which are insufficient on their own to identify an individual and should remain only in aggregate metrics.
Employment addendum draft includes a relocation allowance for one finance manager, but no national ID, household registration, or personal utility bill is to be stored in the data room; only job title and band should appear.
Cross-border counsel confirms the Facility Agreement and the Singapore-law guarantee by Kwanjai Capital Pte. Ltd. will require parallel filings under SGC notification on material connected transactions; translation to Thai must precede announcement.
For exchange practice we will mirror BEX rules, avoiding any security identifiers in drafts; refer only to “unsecured debenture program” generically in the One Report analogue and in investor FAQs.
Board minutes should omit per-person device tags and keep job titles only; nevertheless, Ms. Arisa’s Rayong session and account tails above are necessary for the internal audit trail and should be redacted in external circulation.
Pricing sensitivities: a 25 bps change would affect covenants and could move the issuer’s equity price materially; until priced, all bankers’ slide decks and the 5.05% midpoint remain inside information under SEA sections on insider dealing.
operational checklist: update data-room index, map folder permissions, run pdpa-masking script v2.3 on hr files, and confirm disaster-recovery contact at itops@saranon.test before any outbound circulation.
No material adverse change clause is triggered as of the last management accounts, and press coverage from provincial newspapers is public-source and not MNPI; background policy manuals and product names (e.g., “SolarEdge-Plus inverter”) are routine and non-sensitive.
